title: Gloriously Snappy Mediterranean Chicken Skewers
description: A low-carb, Mediterranean dish featuring yuzu and pickle, served in a cazuela, this recipe is perfect for a healthy and flavorful dinner
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together yuzu juice, Dijon mustard, pickle juice, olive oil, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through.
Transfer the skewers to a cazuela and sprinkle with chopped fresh oregano.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional oregano if desired.
Let the skewers rest for a few minutes before serving to allow the juices to redistribute.
